test.observation: Vitest reported 9 failing tests in exactly the known pre-existing files listed in mission AGENTS.md: src/db/__tests__/schema.test.ts (8), src/app/api/health-data/__tests__/route.test.ts (1), and src/db/__tests__/audit-immutability.test.ts (skipped tests/file-level failure context). No additional failing files were observed.

blockingIssues.description: drizzle/meta/0003_snapshot.json omits public.metric_baselines, public.user_annotations, and public.dismissed_insights introduced by drizzle/0003_dashboard-tables.sql, creating migration metadata drift risk for future db:generate runs.

apps/web/src/lib/dashboard/baselines.ts computeBaselinesOnDemand does not apply per-metric source resolution when querying health_data_daily, so multi-source users can have duplicate/mixed rows counted in baseline averages/stddev.
src/lib/dashboard/annotations.ts maps meal visibility only to glucose and calories_consumed; LLD §9.2 requires meal visibility for any nutrition metric grants as well.

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.init alias for running .factory/init.sh from apps/web so bootstrap used by workers is represented in shared command manifest.
Added .factory/library/migration-metadata-caveats.md documenting Drizzle SQL/snapshot drift risk and why snapshot metadata must be validated with migration SQL.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD requirements by task class and require accurate skillFeedback reporting when tests-first is intentionally skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviewed foundation features (rolling-averages-service, annotation-merge-service, insight-engine-p0, shared-types-and-config) implemented code before tests or skipped tests while handoffs reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit fallback procedure for Drizzle migration metadata conflicts (interactive rename prompts/snapshot drift) in non-interactive worker mode.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: database-schemas-and-migration review found manual detours around db:generate and ended with snapshot mismatch issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix mission metadata mapping for rolling averages so fulfills IDs match validation-contract (rolling average behavior is VAL-COMP-008/009, not VAL-COMP-007/008).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: rolling-averages-service review observed mismatch between features.json fulfills list and validation-contract assertion numbering.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile z-score threshold boundary guidance at |z| = 1.28 across LLD and validation-contract to avoid inconsistent implementation/tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: summary-metrics-service review noted LLD strict inequalities conflict with validation-contract inclusive warning boundary.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Include source-resolution requirement explicitly in baseline feature acceptance criteria/contract checks for health_data_daily queries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: baseline-computation-service review found missing source filter requirement in feature acceptance + contract despite LLD requiring per-metric source resolution.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated TDD-procedure mismatch observations from rolling-averages-service, annotation-merge-service, and insight-engine-p0.
shared-types-and-config should always read architecture.md for simple type/config-only tasks.
